uplink.description: Example 1: full reading (air temperature + humidity + battery)
Example 2: battery-only uplink (flags=0x0002, no air block)
Synthetic full reading at mid-range words (flags=0x0003)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload: temp word 0x8000, humidity word 0x6000, battery word 0x0C80 (3.2 V). Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and normalizing (temperature/humidity rounded to 2 dp, battery to 3 dp).
Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising air block without battery: temp word 0x4000 (-1.25 C), humidity word 0x5000 (31.25%). Expected derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and normalizing.
Synthetic error payload: first byte (version) is 1, not the required 2. Upstream rejects with the same message; ported verbatim.
